title: 22nd Founding Anniversary
description: For 22 years, Brokenshire College Toril has been a home of excellence, compassion, and unwavering faith. We celebrate not just the years, but the people, purpose, and promise behind every milestone.

title: Advent Celebration
description:
Brokenshire College Toril warmly welcomes the season of hope, love, joy, and peace with our Advent Celebration!
As we light the candles of Advent, let us reflect on the true meaning of Christmas and prepare our hearts for the coming of our Savior. Join us in this sacred celebration filled with prayers, songs, and moments of spiritual reflection that bring us closer to Christ and to one another.

title: Buwan ng Wika
description: Sa ilalim ng temang "Filipino, Wikang Mapagpalaya" buong puso nating ipinagdiwang ang ating pambansang wika na nagbubuklod sa ating mga Pilipino.

title: Teachers and Staff Day

title: Strand Week
description:
Strand Week is here, and  time to Compete, Collaborate, and Conquer!
Whether its STEMs innovation, ABMs strategies, HUMSS creativity, TVLs expertise, each strand is ready to dominate the stage and claim their moment of glory!
